response.justification: Over 15 years of professional full-stack development with a strong TypeScript, Node.js, and React track record that directly maps to the primary stack. The current role at re:cinq explicitly includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP framework work, matching the AI agent development requirement precisely. Exceptional testing culture demonstrated through open-source testing libraries, TDD practice across multiple roles, and workshops — well above average for a fullstack candidate. The main gaps are NestJS (not mentioned by name despite deep Node.js experience) and Kotlin (absent from the resume).
strengths: Primary stack alignment: TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS CDK, and MongoDB/SQL across multiple production roles
AI agent and MCP infrastructure work at current role directly satisfies a differentiating requirement
Demonstrated testing culture — open-source test runner and assertion library, TDD across roles, testing workshops
concerns: NestJS not mentioned despite being the core backend framework for this role
No Kotlin experience listed, leaving the secondary backend stack requirement unaddressed
PostgreSQL not explicitly called out; relational DB experience is implied by SQL skills but not confirmed at scale
